creator: sakai@miya.ee.kagu.sut.ac.jp
text:
I made a new port of XBalloon-1.0.
XBalloon is a simple demonstration program for X11.
Balloons move on root window.

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	xballoon
#	xballoon/files
#	xballoon/files/md5
#	xballoon/patches
#	xballoon/patches/patch-aa
#	xballoon/pkg
#	xballoon/pkg/PLIST
#	xballoon/pkg/DESCR
#	xballoon/pkg/COMMENT
#	xballoon/Makefile
#
echo c - xballoon
mkdir -p xballoon > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - xballoon/files
mkdir -p xballoon/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xballoon/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >xballoon/files/md5 << 'END-of-xballoon/files/md5'
XMD5 (xballoon-1.0.tar.gz) = ca6ba577cf1f22aaa59e9d081baf5bc1
END-of-xballoon/files/md5
echo c - xballoon/patches
mkdir -p xballoon/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xballoon/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >xballoon/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-xballoon/patches/patch-aa'
X--- Makefile~	Thu Feb  4 22:43:59 1999
X+++ Makefile	Thu Feb  4 22:44:17 1999
X@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
X-XBALLOON_PREFIX = /usr/X11R6
X+XBALLOON_PREFIX = ${PREFIX}
X XBALLOON_BIN = ${XBALLOON_PREFIX}/bin
X XBALLOON_LIB = ${XBALLOON_PREFIX}/lib/X11/XBalloon
X XBALLOON_MAN = ${XBALLOON_PREFIX}/man/man1
END-of-xballoon/patches/patch-aa
echo c - xballoon/pkg
mkdir -p xballoon/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xballoon/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >xballoon/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-xballoon/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/xballoon
END-of-xballoon/pkg/PLIST
echo x - xballoon/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >xballoon/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-xballoon/pkg/DESCR'
XXBalloon is a simple demonstration program for X. Balloons move on root
Xwindow. You can use a faborite pixmap as balloons.
END-of-xballoon/pkg/DESCR
echo x - xballoon/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >xballoon/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-xballoon/pkg/COMMENT'
XBalloons move on root window
END-of-xballoon/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - xballoon/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >xballoon/Makefile << 'END-of-xballoon/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   XBalloon
X# Version required:    1.0
X# Date created:        3 March 1999
X# Whom:                Sakai Hiroaki <sakai@miya.ee.kagu.sut.ac.jp>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	xballoon-1.0
XCATEGORIES=	x11
XMASTER_SITES=	http://wwwmiya.ee.kagu.sut.ac.jp/~sakai/
XMAINTAINER=	sakai@miya.ee.kagu.sut.ac.jp
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=    Xpm.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/xpm
X
XALL_TARGET=	xballoon
X
XUSE_X11=	yes
X
XMAN1=		xballoon.1
XMANCOMPRESSED=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-xballoon/Makefile
exit
